content:
type: ANSWER
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Heads up: your range(1, len(expected_ids)+1) change breaks existing test_ndcg Case 4 (expected_ids=[id1..id4], retrieved_ids=[id1,id2], expects 1.0 capped by retrieved limit). I reverted IDCG back to ideal_length=min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) in my edit, keeping only my relevance_scores/graded-relevance addition layered on top. If you still want the len(expected_ids)-only behavior you'll need to also update that test, since it's currently asserted.
